---
title: "Warne’s Star of Hope series. Edited by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe “."
---

## Warne’s Star of Hope series. Edited by the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe “.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** n.d.
**Genre:** Edited fiction (by others)
**Format:** Edited booklet series

**Publisher:** London: Frederick Warne and Co., Bedford Street, Covent Garden.

### Notes

This series includes <i>Mary and Norah, or, Queen Katherine’s School</i>;  <i>Willie’s trouble, and How He Came Out of it</i>; <i>New Friends, or, St Cadog’s Well; King Tolv’s Bride</i>; <i>Thomas Green’s Adventure, or, A Young Quixote</i>; and<i> Alice, or, The Little Sentinel</i>. See also Warne’s Victoria Tales and Stories, for another group of texts sometimes erroneously attributed to CMY. <i> The Virtue of Patience</i>, <i>Esther Stanhope </i>and<i> Lost on the Line</i> appear in both series.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
